pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Xray-core is a high-performance, open-source network proxy platform developed by Project X. It supports multiple protocols and advanced transport technologies such as VMESS, VLESS, REALITY, and XHTTP.
Xray-core is designed for secure, flexible, and censorship-resistant networking, providing a powerful foundation for proxy servers, privacy-focused applications, and custom network routing solutions.
